articles.author: Jim Gomez
articles.title: Iran war, Myanmar crisis and South China Sea rifts under the spotlight in ASEAN ministerial talks - AP News
articles.description: Southeast Asia’s top diplomats will express alarm over renewed hostilities in the Middle East when they gather in the Philippine capital for annual talks. The envoys at the three-day meeting are to be joined by counterparts from several governments, including…
articles.content: MANILA, Philippines (AP) Southeast Asias top diplomats will express alarm over renewed hostilities in the Middle East when they gather in the Philippine capital Tuesday for talks to be joined by West… [+6197 chars]
